meaning: adj.容易倾斜的,不安定的,<英>头等的,漂亮的,(毛织品)多绒尖的
examples: It's a fine sunny day in the forest, and a rabbit is sitting outside his burrow, tippy-tapping on his typewriter.
I walk around on my tippy toes.
Why did Tippy have to die?
But legged landers tend to be tippy, and the rover still has to get down to the ground.
Our house sat at the end of Gerard Avenue: coquettish and tattered, on tippy toes, it seemed, from the encroaching world.
